prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1a6449f1`.
codex_response:
Implemented `1a6449f1` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: find the largest nonzero single-color 1-cell rectangular border in the input, even if extra same-color cells are attached to it, and return the crop strictly inside that border. The summary hint was usable after checking it against the official examples, so I did not add a `notes.md`, and I did not need any new shared primitive.

Official verification passed `4/4`, the shared build produced `1000` examples, generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`, and the visual sanity check on [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a6449f1/previews/preview_01.png) looked on-family: multiple colored frames, sparse surrounding noise, and outputs matching the largest-frame interior crop.
